executives.name: F.C. Tseng
executives.background: Dr. F.C. Tseng is a Director and former Vice Chairman of TSMC. He was one of the co-founders of TSMC and served as President from 1998 to 2005. He holds a Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering from National Cheng Kung University.
